description_long: This is a modern entertainment console or shelving unit featuring a central electric fireplace insert with a realistic flame and log effect. The structure is rectangular and constructed from a smooth, light gray material, likely wood or engineered wood with a painted or laminated finish. On either side of the fireplace, there are open shelving compartments, two on each side, providing space for storage or display. The top surface is flat and wide, suitable for placing decorative items, electronics, or a television. The fireplace insert is framed with a slightly protruding border, adding visual depth to the front. The back and sides are solid, with no visible openings or hardware.
description: A modern light gray entertainment console with a central electric fireplace and open shelving on both sides. The unit has a smooth, rectangular design with a flat top and solid sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the electric fireplace insert, open shelves on both sides, and the flat top surface.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, featureless panel and the depth of the unit.
description_view_2: Rear or top-down view revealing the solid back and the open shelving compartments on both sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the solid side panel.
